The '''1998 Wigan Warriors season''' was the 103rd season in the club's [[rugby league]] history and the third season in the [[Super League]]. Coached by [[John Monie]], the Warriors competed in [[Super League III]] and finished in 1st place, and went on to win the  Grand Final at [[Old Trafford]] against [[Leeds Rhinos]]. The club also competed in the [[1998 Challenge Cup]], and finished as runners-up following a surprise defeat in the final against [[Sheffield Eagles (1984)|Sheffield Eagles]].

==Background==
In March 1998, [[Dave Whelan]] became owner of [[Wigan Warriors]] after shareholders voted in favour of the takeover.<ref>{{cite web |title=Whelan takes control |url=https://www.theboltonnews.co.uk/news/6158495.whelan-takes-control/ |website=Bolton News |access-date=17 February 2025 |date=9 March 1998}}</ref>
